python3 -c "
import csv
with open('/lustre/fast/fast/sgoel/forecasting/current_sim/final_runs_v37/opencode_aljazeeraQ12026v37_qwen36plus/26-05-02-00-01-06/agents/minimalHarness_qwen_qwen36-plus_001/workspace/market.csv') as f:
    reader = csv.DictReader(f)
    rows = list(reader)

for r in rows:
    rd = r.get('resolution_date','').strip()
    if rd and rd == '2026-02-16':
        print(f'QID: {r[\"qid\"]}')
        print(f'Title: {r[\"title\"]}')
        print(f'Background: {r[\"background\"][:300] if r[\"background\"] else \"N/A\"}')
        print('---')
"

QID: 207951
Title: Which broadcaster will confirm that it removed from its website a Winter Olympics commentary segment about Israel's bobsleigh team by February 17, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-09. Broadcasters covering the Winter Olympics sometimes post commentary clips online and may later edit or remove them after complaints or editorial review.
---
QID: 22203
Title: Who will be the only woman among Bangladesh's full cabinet ministers announced by February 28, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-14. Bangladesh is expected to announce a new cabinet after its parliamentary election. Full ministers are senior cabinet members and are different from junior or state ministers.
---
QID: 454482
Title: Which former ICC Men's T20 World Cup champion will fail to reach the 2026 Super Eight by February 18, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-04. The ICC Men's T20 World Cup 2026 is in its group stage, and only eight teams will advance to the Super Eight. Several teams in the field have won past editions of the tournament.
---
QID: 456938
Title: Who will Ronda Rousey be announced to fight in her MMA return by 18 February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-19. Ronda Rousey has been away from mixed martial arts for years, and any return bout would require a named opponent. If a comeback fight is announced in the coming weeks, the opponent will be publicly identified.
---
QID: 548734
Title: What storm will officials say is poised to batter parts of Western Europe and worsen flooding in France by 28 February 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-04. France is in a period of persistent wet winter weather, and authorities are monitoring flood risk while watching for additional storm systems that could affect Western Europe.
---
QID: 876124
Title: What town will be identified by Russian authorities and major media by February 2026 as the site of a deadly explosion at a military police facility near St Petersburg?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-01-31. Military and security facilities near major Russian cities can be affected by accidents or attacks during wartime. If a fatal incident occurs near St Petersburg, authorities and news outlets are likely to name the specific town where it happened.
---
QID: 903473
Title: Which Benfica player will Vinicius Jr accuse of making a racist remark during Benfica vs Real Madrid on February 17, 2026?
Background: Question Start Date: 2026-02-09. Benfica and Real Madrid are scheduled to meet in a UEFA Champions League knockout playoff first leg. FIFA has an antiracism procedure that allows a referee to interrupt a match if discriminatory abuse is alleged.
